tools.name: check_domain_availability
tools.description: Bir alan adinin (domain) kayit icin musait olup olmadigini ve fiyatini sorgular. Ornek: "vizyonpay.com bos mu?". Yalnizca musaitlik ve fiyat bilgisi doner; kisisel/whois verisi donmez.

tools.name: get_domain_pricing
tools.description: izHost alan adi (domain) uzantilarinin (TLD) kayit/yenileme/transfer fiyat listesini doner.

tools.name: get_cloud_server_pricing
tools.description: izHost bulut sunucu (Cloud Server / VDS) kaynak fiyatlandirmasini (CPU, RAM, disk vb.) ve planlarini doner.

tools.name: get_email_pricing
tools.description: izHost kurumsal e-posta (izMail) paket ve fiyatlarini doner.

tools.name: get_mail_relay_pricing
tools.description: izHost Mail Relay (SMTP gonderim) gunluk limit kademeleri ve fiyatlarini doner.

tools.name: get_web_hosting_pricing
tools.description: izHost web hosting (Linux ve Windows) paket ve fiyatlarini doner.

tools.name: get_ssl_products
tools.description: izHost SSL sertifikasi urunlerini (marka, tur, fiyat) listeler.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: izHost'un sundugu tum hizmetlerin (bulut sunucu, hosting, kurumsal e-posta, mail relay, SSL, domain, IzDesk, AD Yonetimi) ozetini ve sayfa baglantilarini doner.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp.izhost.com" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_email_pricing · Public sink: get_email_pricing.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_email_pricing · Public sink: get_email_pricing

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
